summary.en: Execute a read-only SQL query and return a tabular result set.
summary.zh_CN: 执行只读 SQL 查询并返回表格式结果。

requiredEnvironment.name: CAP_SQLITEDB_PATH
requiredEnvironment.description: When using the sqlitedb module: filesystem path to the SQLite database file.

requiredEnvironment.name: CAP_POSTGRESDB_URL
requiredEnvironment.description: When using the postgresdb module: PostgreSQL connection URI (postgresql://user:pass@host:5432/dbname).
